steps.title: Cells should arrive pelleted and frozen from collaborator
steps.instruction: Cells should arrive pelleted and frozen from collaborator

steps.title: Using wide-mouth pipette wash pellet with...
steps.instruction: Using wide-mouth pipette wash pellet with 500uL 150 mM ammonium acetate (25x aspirations)

steps.title: Centrifuge @ 200 g for 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge @ 200 g for 5 min

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Repeat steps 2-4 a second time
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 2-4 a second time

steps.title: Add 4-6 non-sterile 2
steps.instruction: Add 4-6 non-sterile 2.3mm stainless steel beads to the tube.

steps.title: Dispense 225 ul of ice-cold Methanol...
steps.instruction: Dispense 225 ul of ice-cold Methanol at -20 deg C containing 1.5% iSTD “SPLASH” mix into extraction tube 1.

steps.title: Seal the sample tube and place...
steps.instruction: Seal the sample tube and place it in the bead beater at an amplitude 20 Hz for 15 minutes to homogenize the sample & extract the metabolites.

steps.title: Close the tube
steps.instruction: Close the tube.

steps.title: Vortex extraction tube 1 for 10 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex extraction tube 1 for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Open extraction tube 1 and dispense 750ul of ice-cold MTBE
steps.instruction: Open extraction tube 1 and dispense 750ul of ice-cold MTBE.

steps.title: Close extraction tube 1 and vortex for 10s
steps.instruction: Close extraction tube 1 and vortex for 10s.

steps.title: Shake extraction tube 1 for 6...
steps.instruction: Shake extraction tube 1 for 6 min at 4 deg C.

steps.title: Open extraction tube 1 and dispense...
steps.instruction: Open extraction tube 1 and dispense 188 ul of LC-MS grade water containing the 18 HILIC iSTDs at 1/3rd of their normal concentration as defined in the HILIC extraction SOP except CUDA.

steps.title: Close extraction tube 1 and vortex it for 20 seconds
steps.instruction: Close extraction tube 1 and vortex it for 20 seconds

steps.title: Centrifuge extraction tube 1 for 2 min at 14,000xg
steps.instruction: Centrifuge extraction tube 1 for 2 min at 14,000xg.

steps.title: Open extraction tube 1 and transfer...
steps.instruction: Open extraction tube 1 and transfer 700ul of the upper phase into a single 700ul tubetwo new separate tubes(350ul/ tube); henceforth referred to as (Lipidomics tube 1) and (Lipidomics tube 2).

steps.title: Transfer 250ul of the bottom phase...
steps.instruction: Transfer 250ul of the bottom phase from extraction tube 1 into a new single-tube hereafter referred to as (Hilic tube 1).

steps.title: Centrivap Lipidomics tube 1, and Hilic...
steps.instruction: Centrivap Lipidomics tube 1, and Hilic tube 1 at room temperature until dry.

steps.title: Reconstitute Lipidomics tube 1 in 120...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute Lipidomics tube 1 in 120 ul of Methanol containing CUDA istd and close the tube.

steps.title: Perform lipid cleanup on HILIC tube 1
steps.instruction: Perform lipid cleanup on HILIC tube 1: Add 500uL of 1:1 ACN:Water and vortex for 20s

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14,000 g for 2 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14,000 g for 2 min.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to a new tube and dry down
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to a new tube and dry down

steps.title: Reconstitute HILIC tube 1 in 60ul...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute HILIC tube 1 in 60ul of ACN:H2O (4:1 v/v) containing CUDA and close the tube.

steps.title: Sonicate Lipidomics tube 1 and Hilic...
steps.instruction: Sonicate Lipidomics tube 1 and Hilic tube 1 at room temperature for 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge Lipidomics tube 1 and Hilic...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge Lipidomics tube 1 and Hilic tube 1 at 14,000xg for 2 min.

steps.title: Open lipidomics tube 1, transfer equal...
steps.instruction: Open lipidomics tube 1, transfer equal fractions of the extract into two separate amber glass vials with micro-inserts, hereafter referred to as (lipidomics vial 1 pos) and (lipidomics vial 1 neg), and close the vials.a

steps.title: Open Hilic tube 1 and transfer...
steps.instruction: Open Hilic tube 1 and transfer the extract into an amber glass vial with a micro-insert, hereafter referred to as (Hilic vial) and close the vial.

steps.title: Analyze the samples via UHPLC–Orbitrap as follows
steps.instruction: Analyze the samples via UHPLC–Orbitrap as follows.
